heading: Suspension and termination of orders
label: 4812 Suspension and termination of orders
notes: Effective DateSection effective , see , set out as a note under .Jan. 1, 1986section 1631 of Pub. L. 99–198section 4801 of this title

children.heading: Authority of Secretary
children.label: a Authority of Secretary
children.text: If after the initial referendum provided for in the Secretary determines that an order, or a provision of the order, obstructs or does not tend to effectuate the declared policy of this chapter, the Secretary shall terminate or suspend the operation of such order or provision.section 4811(a) of this title

children.heading: Referendum to terminate or suspend; eligible voters; requirements for approval; termination or suspension date; one referendum within 2-year period
children.label: b Referendum to terminate or suspend; eligible voters; requirements for approval; termination or suspension date; one referendum within 2-year period
A
children.text: Except as provided in paragraph (2), after the initial referendum provided for in , on the request of a number of persons equal to at least 15 percent of persons who have been producers and importers during a representative period, as determined by the Secretary, the Secretary shall conduct a referendum to determine whether the producers and importers favor the termination or suspension of the order.section 4811(a) of this title

children.label: i
children.text: suspend or terminate collection of assessments under the order not later than 6 months after the date the Secretary determines that suspension or termination of the order is favored by a majority of the producers and importers voting in the referendum; and

children.label: ii
children.text: terminate the order in an orderly manner as soon as practicable after the date of such determination.

Except with respect to a referendum required to be conducted under , the Secretary shall not be required by paragraph (1) to conduct more than one referendum under this chapter in a 2-year period.section 4811 of this title

children.heading: Termination or suspension not to be considered an order
children.label: c Termination or suspension not to be considered an order
children.text: The termination or suspension of an order, or a provision of an order, shall not be considered an order within the meaning of this chapter.
